recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A young college professor and his pregnant wife unwittingly release a malevolent entity with murderous intentions.

Three college friends hit the biggest party of the year, where a mysterious phenomenon disrupts the night, quickly descending into a chaos that challenges their friendships - and whether they can stay alive.

recommendations.title: Screwed
recommendations.overview: A chauffeur kidnaps his rich boss's dog to hold it for ransom, but when she accidentally gets the dog back, she thinks that it's the chauffeur who's been kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn: Revelation
recommendations.overview: When calls to her grandmother go unanswered, Jamie Lowell uncovers the truth behind her mysterious disappearance.

recommendations.title: Misericordia
recommendations.overview: Jérémie returns to his hometown for the funeral of his former boss, the village baker. He decides to stay for a few days with Martine, the man's widow. A mysterious disappearance, a threatening neighbor and a priest with strange intentions make Jérém

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The Pack
recommendations.overview: Man’s best friend becomes his worst nightmare when a horde of bloodthirsty wild dogs descends upon a family’s farmhouse in a fang-bearing fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Feral
recommendations.overview: A wild animal attacks six medical students on a weekend hike in the woods. One by one, they become infected with a “feral disease,” turning them into rabid, bloodthirsty creatures, and the vacation becomes a nightmare as they fight to survive each ot

recommendations.title: Night Call
recommendations.overview: Mady, a student, works as a locksmith by night. He helps Claire get into her apartment and soon realizes that she lied to him about her identity and robbed something that belonged to a dangerous man, Yannick. Mady gets embroiled in a manhunt and will

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.
